name: galvo-memory
description: Graph-native memory layer for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent memory for Claude Code and Codex via Neo4j.
interface.longDescription: Captures every session, decision, commit, file edit, test run, and failure into a Neo4j-backed 12-label knowledge graph. Surfaces top-of-mind context at SessionStart, retrieves semantically-relevant hits on every UserPromptSubmit, and scores retrieval utility at SessionEnd for a SAGE-lite feedback loop. Three-tier scope partitioning (project/personal/universal). Works with any MCP-aware client; ships first-class lifecycle hooks for Claude Code.
